hero.title: Manufacturing & R&D
hero.description: A supplier can make a good sample. A factory partner can make the same product - again and again - on schedule. Ibocode combines manufacturing discipline with practical R&D support.

capabilities.title: Explore Our Capabilities
capabilities.description: Ibocode combines manufacturing discipline with practical engineering support so you can launch faster and scale with confidence.

cards.title: Factory Overview
cards.description: Production areas and quality checkpoints designed for repeatability. See our facility organization.

cards.title: Production Lines
cards.description: Process control for consistency. Dedicated lines optimized for scanner, printer, and POS assembly.

cards.title: Capacity & Lead Time
cards.description: Predictable scheduling and scale support. Understand our standard lead times and planning.

cards.title: Engineering & Lab
cards.description: Prototyping, DFM, and validation support. How we help you launch faster.

primary.title: Request a Factory Capability Pack
primary.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a practical overview and next steps.

secondary.title: Request a Prototype Plan
secondary.description: Verify read performance, ergonomics, and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
